Dialog.name: MSG_TAR_STOP_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It's not safe to continue any further. Check that device over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TAR_STOP_MITSURU_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}I know you're eager to go on, but use that device to return here for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TAR_STOP_FUKA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's dangerous to keep going. Could you go take a look at that device over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TAR_STOP_FUKA_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Please come back for now. You should be able to use that device to return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_DEFEAT_GK_FI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}You're doing great, but I'm sure that last battle must have worn you out some.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If you continue on now, there's no telling when you'll find another teleporter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Since there's one right here, I suggest you make use of it and stop for a break.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_DEFEAT_GK_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}It looks like you can move forward now, but are you tired from that last battle?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you keep going, I don't know when you'll encounter another teleporter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I think it would be good to use the one here to return to the entrance for now.[n]{f 1 1}
